TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Gitingest MCP - an MCP server to read GitHub repos
0:33 Video Overview
1:31 gitingest-mcp repo overview: fetching repo summary, folder structure and content
2:39 Using trelis-gitingest-mcp with Claude Desktop
6:35 Using trelis-gitingest-mcp with Windsurf or Cursor
9:28 How to easily load MCP config files. See Trelis.com/ADVANCED-inference
11:42 Understanding gitingest-mcp using MCP inspector
14:31 MCP Resources and Prompts! Hardly anyone uses these, but they can be useful!
15:52 ADVANCED tips: Tool argument descriptions, nested directories and private repos. 
18:12 Conclusion
